title: smilax oblonga
intro: Smilax oblonga, also known as the Chinese sarsaparilla or five-leaf smilax, is a plant species that belongs to the Smilacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Smilax oblonga include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and lower blood pressure. Smilax oblonga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
